coverDesc: A next-generation on-demand grocery marketplace designed to connect customer ordering with multi-vendor store operations and centralized administration.
aboutSlogan: Engineered for speed, security, and scalability.
aboutDesc: This proposal outlines our technical plan for building a highly customizable multi-role marketplace application matching your exact business requirements.
aboutMissionText: Provide an intuitive, fast digital ordering storefront that bridges local grocers with retail buyers securely.
aboutVisionText: Empower local commerce through modern cloud automation, vector-based product search, and instant payout workflows.
aboutQuoteText: Quality is never an accident; it is always the result of intelligent effort.

blocks.text: Detailed functional requirements description for client application core storefront and cart checkout flows.

points: Real-time push notifications for order tracking

blocks.text: Functional specifications for merchants to set up their inventory, update pricing, and dispatch customer orders.

points: Store profile creation and KYC registration
Product listing CRUD with bulk CSV import
Live order management and dispatch statuses
Monthly payouts and commission calculator sheet

blocks.text: Core administration features to moderate merchants, review commission models, and monitor platform performance.

points: Global platform analytics (sales, users, active orders)
Taxation, commission tier, and discount code controls
Comprehensive server status logs and incident monitors
